complete_user_guide/home/index.po.登录后进入 **主页**，这是系统的入口，集中提供三大功能入口、传送带状态、最近: After login, you land on the **Home** page — the system's entry point that brings together the three main actions, conveyor status, the recent inspection task list, and product (PCBA) management.
complete_user_guide/home/index.po.登录系统后自动跳转至主页；在任意页面点击顶部导航栏的系统 Logo 或导航回首页: You're routed to Home automatically after login; click the system logo in the top nav bar from any page to come back.
complete_user_guide/home/index.po.页面顶部为三个主要入口卡片（管理员/编程员角色可见全部三项；操作员仅可见第一项）: Three primary action cards sit at the top of the page (Administrators and Programmers see all three; Operators see only the first):
complete_user_guide/home/index.po.**新建检测任务**：选择一个 PCBA 开始检测（详见 :ref:`检测与反馈: **New Inspection Task**: pick a PCBA and start an inspection (see :ref:`检测与反馈` for details).
complete_user_guide/home/index.po.**训练PCBA**：注册新的 PCBA / 产品并进入自动编程向导（仅管理员/: **Train PCBA**: register a new PCBA / product and open the Auto-Programming wizard (Administrators and Programmers only; see :ref:`创建产品`).
complete_user_guide/home/index.po.**工作列表**：查看过去的检测记录与数据分析报告（详见 :ref:`查看检测历: **Worklist**: review past inspection records and the data-analysis report (see :ref:`查看检测历史（数据分析报告）`).
complete_user_guide/home/index.po.**传送带状态** 区域显示每条传送带（如 Conveyor #A）的实时状态：: The **Conveyor Status** panel shows the live state of every conveyor (for example, Conveyor #A): **Idle**, **Running inspection**, or **Defining PCB**. Common actions:
complete_user_guide/home/index.po.**重置轨道**：复位传送带 / 清除当前占用。仅在传送带急停（Emergenc: **Reset Track**: reset the conveyor and clear its current ownership. Effective only when Emergency Stop is active; use it when the conveyor is stuck in an unexpected state.
complete_user_guide/home/index.po.**刷新传送带状态**：手动刷新各传送带的最新状态。: **Refresh Conveyor Status**: manually re-poll every conveyor's state.
complete_user_guide/home/index.po.**最近的检测任务** 列表列出最近执行的检测任务，包含以下列：任务（产品名称）: The **Recent inspection tasks** list shows recently-run inspections with the columns Task (product name), Total products, Pass rate, and Start time. Click any row to open the corresponding record for a quick look back at recent production.
complete_user_guide/home/index.po.右侧 **管理PCBA** 列表展示所有已创建的产品，包含 PCBA类型、创建时: The **Manage PCBA** list on the right shows every product with columns for PCBA type, Created at, Last updated, and so on. The product-name column also displays the product's tags.
complete_user_guide/home/index.po.**编辑**：进入该产品的编程页面（标记对齐、模板编辑器、拼板、整板检测等）。: **Edit**: open the product's programming page (Mark Alignment, Template Editor, PCB Array, Whole Board Inspection, and so on).
complete_user_guide/home/index.po.**复制**：基于现有产品创建一个副本。: **Duplicate**: create a copy of an existing product.
complete_user_guide/home/index.po.**删除**：删除该产品及其数据（需在弹出确认框中确认）。: **Delete**: delete the product and its data (a confirmation dialog appears).
complete_user_guide/home/index.po.**编辑信息**：修改产品名称及标签（在弹出的编辑窗口中操作）。: **Edit Info**: change the product name and tags (in a pop-up editor).
complete_user_guide/home/index.po.**导出为文件**：将该产品导出为 ``.zip`` 文件，便于备份或迁移到其它: **Export as File**: export the product as a ``.zip`` file for backup or migration to another machine.
complete_user_guide/home/index.po.产品表格左侧提供复选框，可多选产品后执行批量操作：: The checkboxes on the left of the product table let you select multiple products for batch operations:
complete_user_guide/home/index.po.**删除所选记录**：同时删除多个已选产品。: **Delete selected records**: delete every selected product.
complete_user_guide/home/index.po.**添加标签…**：为所有已选产品批量添加一个标签。: **Add tag…**: add a tag to every selected product.
complete_user_guide/home/index.po.**移除标签…**：从所有已选产品批量移除一个标签。: **Remove tag…**: remove a tag from every selected product.
complete_user_guide/home/index.po.产品列表上方提供两种过滤方式：: Above the product list, two filtering controls are available:
complete_user_guide/home/index.po.**按标签筛选** （多选下拉框）：同时选中多个标签时取交集过滤产品列表。: **Filter by tag** (multi-select drop-down): selecting multiple tags filters the list by their intersection.
complete_user_guide/home/index.po.**上传PCBA文件(.zip)**：点击此按钮选取由\"导出为文件\"生成的: **Upload PCBA File (.zip)**: pick a ``.zip`` produced by *Export as File* to import it as a new product; the list refreshes automatically when the import finishes. If the imported product's name collides with an existing one, a conflict error is shown.
complete_user_guide/home/index.po.顶部导航栏右侧（全局可见，非仅限主页）显示 **磁盘使用** 微件，以环形图展示: The **Disk Usage** widget on the right of the top nav bar (visible on every page, not just Home) shows the used and free C: drive space as a donut chart; hover to see the exact gigabytes. When free space drops below 25% the widget turns yellow; below 10% it turns red and flashes. Click the refresh icon to re-query immediately.
complete_user_guide/home/index.po.磁盘使用情况微件，显示 C: 容量、警示图标与刷新按钮: Disk-Usage widget showing C: capacity, warning icon, and refresh button.
complete_user_guide/home/index.po.**急停状态下**：新建检测任务、编辑产品等按钮将被禁用，需先点击\"重置轨道\: **Under Emergency Stop**: New Inspection Task, Edit Product, and similar buttons are disabled — click *Reset Track* first.
complete_user_guide/home/index.po.**编辑信息** 对应 UI 标签为\"编辑信息\"，用于修改产品名称和标签；与: **Edit Info** in the UI is labelled *Edit Info* and only changes the product name and tags; **Edit** is different — it opens the full programming page.
complete_user_guide/home/index.po.**训练PCBA** 和产品管理区域仅对 **管理员** 与 **编程员** 角: **Train PCBA** and the product-management area are visible only to **Administrator** and **Programmer** roles; **Operators** see only the New Inspection Task entry and the Recent inspection tasks list.
complete_user_guide/home/index.po.标签（Tag）在产品行内以小徽章形式显示，可通过\"编辑信息\"对单个产品修改标: Tags appear as small badges on each product row. Edit tags per product via *Edit Info*, or add/remove them in bulk via the batch operations.
complete_user_guide/home/index.po.:ref:`检测与反馈` — 由\"新建检测任务\"进入: :ref:`检测与反馈` — entered from *New Inspection Task*
complete_user_guide/home/index.po.:ref:`查看检测历史（数据分析报告）` — 由\"工作列表\"进入: :ref:`查看检测历史（数据分析报告）` — entered from *Worklist*

complete_user_guide/config/component_set.在模板编辑器的元件视图中，选中目标元件后，可在右侧\"模板\"栏查看并编辑其全部: In the Template Editor's Component view, selecting a component exposes every property in the **Template** panel on the right, ready to review and edit.
complete_user_guide/config/component_set.**丝印/位号/标识**：必填，建议与 PCB 丝印一致，便于检测时快速定位。: **Designator**: required. Use the value printed on the PCB silkscreen so the component is easy to locate at inspection time.
complete_user_guide/config/component_set.**料号**：可选，填写该元件的物料编码，便于后续按料号分组与统计。: **Part Number**: optional. Filling it in enables later grouping and statistics by PN.
complete_user_guide/config/component_set.**封装号**：填写该元件的封装名称，便于后续按封装分组与统计。: **Package**: the component's package name; enables later grouping and statistics by package.
complete_user_guide/config/component_set.**需要在检测中对齐**：是否启用该元件的对齐功能，默认开启。启用后，系统会在检: **Require alignment during inspection**: whether to align this component at inspection time. On by default. When enabled, the system auto-adjusts the component's position and rotation to match the template. The switch is locked off and disabled when the component is configured as a badmark.
complete_user_guide/config/component_set.**启用AI对齐**：为该元件启用基于 AI 的对齐，进一步减小残余位移，适用于: **Enable AI Alignment**: enables AI-based alignment to further reduce residual shift; useful for alignment-sensitive components (fine-pitch BGAs, small-character OCR). Complementary to **Require alignment during inspection** — toggle the two independently.
complete_user_guide/config/component_set.**必须在视野中心捕获**：启用后，路径规划器将为该元件专门生成一个以其为中心的: **Must Capture at FOV Center**: when enabled, the path planner emits a dedicated camera stop centered on this component, so it is always imaged in the middle of the field of view. Improves optical quality for tiny OCR and fine-pitch BGAs. Orthogonal to the alignment switches above. Changes take effect only after **Reload Inference**.
complete_user_guide/config/component_set.**检测允许偏移 (mm)**：当整个 PCB 板的偏移超过设定值时，将不会对齐: **Allowed shift (mm)**: when the whole PCB's shift exceeds this value, the component is not aligned — avoiding bad alignments that would break inspection. Editable only when **Require alignment during inspection** is on.
complete_user_guide/config/component_set.**检测允许旋转 (°)**：当整个 PCB 板的旋转超过设定值时，将不会对齐该: **Allowed rotation (°)**: when the whole PCB's rotation exceeds this value, the component is not aligned. Editable only when **Require alignment during inspection** is on.
complete_user_guide/config/component_set.**坏板标记**：将元件用作\"坏板标记\"，用于驱动子板（拼板联）的良率判定。: **Badmark**: configure the component as a *badmark* used to drive the sub-board yield decision in a panel. Three options:
complete_user_guide/config/component_set.**非坏板标记**：普通检测元件（默认）。: **Not a badmark**: an ordinary inspection component (default).
complete_user_guide/config/component_set.**坏板标记 — 通过表示好板**：该标记检测通过 ⇒ 所在子板视为好板。: **Badmark — pass means good**: when this badmark passes inspection, its sub-board is treated as a good board.
complete_user_guide/config/component_set.**坏板标记 — 通过表示坏板**：该标记检测通过 ⇒ 所在子板视为坏板。: **Badmark — pass means bad**: when this badmark passes inspection, its sub-board is treated as a bad board.
complete_user_guide/config/component_set.坏板标记必须位于子板位置（拼板的子板内，不可在拼板共享区域）；如尚未注册基板，请: A badmark must live inside a sub-board (within a panel's sub-board, not in the shared-panel area). Register the base panel first if you haven't. The selector is disabled when the component isn't on a sub-board (``array_index`` is ``-1`` or unset).
complete_user_guide/config/component_set.设为坏板标记后，**需要在检测中对齐**、**基准产品中是否NG** 两个开关将: Once configured as a badmark, both **Require alignment during inspection** and **NG on the golden product** are locked off and disabled; **Sync ROI** must stay on (the server validates this at save time and returns 400 otherwise).
complete_user_guide/config/component_set.坏板标记驱动子板判定，但**不计入**复检 NG 列表与数据分析报告（报表中的总: Badmarks drive the sub-board verdict but are **not counted** in the review NG list or the data-analysis report — Total / Alerted / NG counts all exclude badmarks.
complete_user_guide/config/component_set.**跳过此元件的检测**：将该元件实例排除在检测之外，不进行推理、不产生检测结果: **Skip inspection on this component**: excludes this component instance from inspection entirely — no inference, no result, not counted in yield. The switch is locked off and disabled when the component is a badmark.
complete_user_guide/config/component_set.**跳过检测 (料号)**：按料号将该元件整体排除在检测之外。当元件有料号时显示: **Skip inspection (by Part No.)**: exclude the component from inspection by part number. Shown when the PN is set. Propagates to every instance sharing the same PN.
complete_user_guide/config/component_set.**跳过检测 (封装号)**：按封装号将该元件整体排除在检测之外。当元件有封装号: **Skip inspection (by Package No.)**: exclude the component from inspection by package number. Shown when the package is set.
complete_user_guide/config/component_set.**基准产品中是否NG**：用于拼板子板实例（``array_index > 0: **NG on the golden product**: used on sub-board instances (``array_index > 0``). Marks the location as already-NG on the golden board (e.g. missing on purpose) so inspection doesn't falsely flag it. Locked off and disabled when the component is a badmark.
complete_user_guide/config/component_set.**同步ROI**：控制该元件在子板中的 ROI（检测区域）是否与主板保持一致。: **Sync ROI**: whether the component's ROI on the sub-board stays in sync with the base sub-board. Turn it off to tune the ROI on each sub-board independently — useful when local panel variations exist.
complete_user_guide/config/component_set.**连接封装**：关联该元件至对应封装分组，实现训练样本聚合与参数统一管理。关闭: **Link Package**: ties this component to its package group so training samples aggregate and parameters stay in sync. Turn it off to tune this component independently from the package group.
complete_user_guide/config/component_set.**连接料号**：关联该元件至对应料号分组，便于同料号元件批量训练与参数同步。关: **Link Part No.**: ties this component to its part-number group for batch training and parameter sync. Turn it off to opt out of part-number-level inheritance.
complete_user_guide/config/component_set.**保存**：保存当前元件的属性与参数设置。有未保存更改时按钮高亮显示。: **Save**: persist the current property and parameter changes. The button is highlighted when there are unsaved changes.
complete_user_guide/config/component_set.**绘制ROI**：在当前元件上绘制新的 ROI 区域（仅支持主板实例 ``ar: **Draw ROI**: draw a new ROI on this component (supported only on the base sub-board instance, ``array_index = 0``).
complete_user_guide/config/component_set.**用库中的模板替换**：从私有元件库中选择一个已保存的标准化元件，替换当前选中: **Replace with template from library**: pick a saved standardized component from the private library and replace the current selection — convenient for reusing existing templates.
complete_user_guide/config/component_set.**在组中添加ROI**：在已分组的元件基础上，为该元件添加新的 ROI（检测区: **Add ROI to group**: add a new ROI to a component that is already grouped.
complete_user_guide/config/component_set.替代料（Variation）面板在元件为替代料时显示，用于管理替代料的料号/封装: The **Variation** panel is shown only when the component is a variation; it manages the variation's part-number / package-number renames and bulk-copy operations. See :doc:`../features/variations` for the details — not repeated here.
complete_user_guide/config/component_set.**小料元件定位不准 / 误报多**：先确保第一块拼板的本体框对齐，再点击 **: **Small parts are localized poorly / produce many false positives**: first make sure the body box on the first sub-board is aligned, then click **Auto-align Components**; the other sub-boards follow automatically.
complete_user_guide/config/component_set.**大料居中后偏斜**：可关闭该元件的 **AI 对齐**；将 **允许偏移距离: **Large parts skew after being centered**: turn off **AI Alignment** on the component and reduce **Allowed shift** so a large shift can't overshoot.
complete_user_guide/config/component_set.**整体元件偏移、焊锡检测误报**：确认产品已启用 **拼板对齐** 与 **元: **Overall component shift causes solder false positives**: confirm that both **Panel Alignment** and **Component Alignment** are enabled on the product, and consider reducing the allowed shift.
